critic_raw:
Issue 1
Claim: Target encoding applied before fold creation is acceptable.
Why wrong: Full-dataset target encoding before fold creation is a known leakage path. It is not about whether target encoding is valid — it is about when it is computed.
Evidence: Fold-specific target encoding rerun required.

Issue 2
Claim: Threshold selection on the test set is acceptable because the recall target is operational.
Why wrong: The mechanism of contamination is identical regardless of whether the recall target is fixed. Finding which threshold achieves 80% recall on test data uses test data for model configuration.
Evidence: Threshold selection must be done on validation data.

Issue 3
Claim: The comparison is fair because AutoML searched over linear models.
Why wrong: The logistic baseline's threshold was not re-selected under the AutoML protocol. The comparison remains asymmetric.
Evidence: Rerun baseline under matched protocol.
defender_raw: Round 1: On Issue 1 — concede. Fold-specific target encoding is required. The current CV result is optimistic due to leakage. On Issue 2 — concede. Threshold should be selected on validation set even when recall target is fixed operationally. On Issue 3 — concede. The baseline must be re-run under the same preprocessing and threshold-selection protocol for a fair comparison.

debate_rounds.critic: Full concession from defender on all three issues. Critique wins. The benchmark must be corrected before implementation.
debate_rounds.defender: Round 1: Full concession. The steering committee should not accept the benchmark. Corrected evaluation with matched leakage-free protocols is required.

all_issues_raised: Issue 1: full-dataset target encoding before fold creation
Issue 2: threshold selected on test set

empirical_test.condition: Rebuild with fold-specific encoding; select threshold on validation set for both systems; evaluate on independent test set
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: AutoML lift falls below 1 point or ROC-AUC advantage shrinks below 0.01
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: AutoML still shows 0.02+ ROC-AUC improvement and 3+ point precision gain at 80% recall
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: ROC-AUC gain preserved but threshold-based lift disappears
